limitations: ai_investment_intensity: The $624M figure reflects an M&A acquisition price for an AI company, not a discrete capex/infrastructure spend; scored 4 rather than 5 as no multi-year AI capex program or recurring dedicated AI budget is quantified in the excerpts

ai_narrative_concreteness: Named deployed products with operating detail are described, but no quantified business results (e.g., time saved, % efficiency gain) are provided in the excerpts, capping score at 4

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk section is present and highly detailed with company-specific mechanisms (law enforcement high-stakes use, EU AI Act, bias in models, IP risks from AI-generated code); scored 4 as risks are scenario-specific but no quantified risk exposure or named governance oversight body is disclosed in the excerpts
